title: UFO obsessive Mark Christopher Lee says he has been threatened following Donald Trump alien disclosure claims
description: Filmmaker Mark Christopher Lee claims that he is the target of an anonymous intimidation campaign after recently alleging that US President Donald Trump is preparing to make a historic alien disclosure speech later this year.

title: More UFO files? Why a Winnipeg-based expert is skeptical of Trump’s latest remarks
description: A Winnipeg resident who has spent decades researching UFOs says significant questions remain after U.S. President Donald Trump called for the release of government records related to aliens and unidentified flying objects.

title: Little Marco’s UFO Secret Exposed After Trump Announcement
description: Photo Illustration by Thomas Levinson/The Daily Beast/Getty/CSPANDonald Trump wants to crush The Swamp. The leaks, the sneaks, and the secrets are all there. Our writers, David Gardner, Farrah Tomazin, and Sarah Ewall-Wice, are sifting through the ooze so you don’t have to. Don’t miss out.In this week’s news from the ooze: Dan Scavino, Stephen Miller, Barack Obama, King Lear, Hilary Hahn, Ric Grenell, Philip Glass, Marco Rubio, Edward “Big Balls” Coristin, Paul Ingrassia, Andrew Yang, Caitlyn Jenner, Miss Universe Fatima Bosch, Miss Universe Persia Sahar Biniaz, Miss Universe Czech Republic Michaela Tomanová, Nawat Itsaragrisil, and Bad Bunny.Close Encounters of the Little Marco KindRead more at The Daily Beast.

title: Top Idaho Cities For UFO Sightings, According To Tracking Center
description: If you've lived in Idaho long enough, you're aware that the local media more than frequently reports on alleged unidentified aerial phenomena over the Gem State. Continue reading...

title: American DeepTech Announces New Investment Focus on UAP Reverse Engineering Following Historic Federal Disclosure
description: Following accelerated commitments by the U.S. government toward Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) transparency, deep tech and AI investment firm American DeepTech today announced a major strategic initiative to fund, develop, and commercialize UAP-derived and UAP-inspired technologies.
